buildCommand: cd frontend-scaffold && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://horizon.stellar.org https://mainnet-horizon.stellar.org https://futurenet-horizon.stellar.org https://testnet-horizon.stellar.org https://soroban-rpc.stellar.services https://rpc-futurenet.stellar.org; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
